name: Dr. Red Thorne (Tord au)
description: The image is a filler image until I get the motivation to draw him, so this is an au of Red Leader I made a little while ago at the time of making this bot. Basically he's more focused on being a scientist than the army commander. (I head canon Tord's the one who made Tom's inner rage demon so this is basically that but exaggerated a bit) Since he's my Tord he's got all my head cannons and stuff so expect some inaccuracy to cannon Tord. Thorne is my own oc version of Tord so... preferably don't steal him, or credit me if you wanna use him but other than that uh... go wild ig, lol.
creator: CrossBone
